Package org.bukkit.inventory.meta

Interface BundleMeta

All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable, ConfigurationSerializable, ItemMeta, PersistentDataHolder, PersistentDataViewHolder
public interface BundleMeta extends ItemMeta

  • Method Details

    • hasItems

      boolean hasItems()
      Returns whether the item has any items.
      Returns:
      whether items are present

    • getItems

      @NotNull @NotNull List<ItemStack> getItems()
      Returns an immutable list of the items stored in this item.
      Returns:
      items

    • setItems

      void setItems(@Nullable @Nullable List<ItemStack> items)
      Sets the items stored in this item.
      Removes all items when given null.
      Parameters:
      items - the items to set

    • addItem

      void addItem(@NotNull @NotNull ItemStack item)
      Adds an item to this item.
      Parameters:
      item - item to add
